title: One Wish Overhaul
description: Vanilla pack with some QoL features and performance optimizations!
body:
![One Wish Overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ff1ddea4e3f5f03904dab599b548aeda78c2b16_0.webp)

**A modpack containing several Quality of Life and optimization mods, along with resource packs that enhance the vanilla experience!**

With these mods, players can enjoy smoother performance, improved visuals, and various quality-of-life improvements, all while staying true to the original feel of the game. Whether you're looking for a more optimized experience or simply want to make the game more enjoyable, this modpack has something for everyone.

During testing on vanilla the game ran at around 180 FPS, while with this modpack performance reached up to 300 FPS (Fancy, 32 chunks | 1660S, i9-11900KF, 8GB)

![Vanilla Experience+ Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/350bf7b5f7bfabe08c25164ad9629294512dd7fe_0.webp)
![Some QoL Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aadb3dffa62a74625ab0f678e6a2886558bafd39_0.webp)
![Legendary Tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebd83161151b2f5986ea2940dfdfae4342572ef5_0.webp)
